name: Unbox The Cats
short_description: Find and rescue adorable cats hidden among boxes. Feed them treats to add them to your collection. Discover 100 unique cats in this casual puzzle game inspired by Minesweeper.
detailed_description:
Unbox The Cats reimagines the classic minesweeper with an adorable feline twist! Instead of avoiding mines, you'll be discovering cute cats hiding in boxes. But finding them is just the beginning – these hungry kitties need treats to stick around!

Key Features:

  • Search for hidden cats but remember to keep biscuits ready! Each discovered cat must be fed before you continue, or they'll scamper away.

  • Score & Progress: Feed cats with varying amounts of biscuits to earn points. Reach the target score to advance and unlock new challenges!

  • Collect coins and get useful items:

    • Biscuit Jars to replenish your treats

    • Cat Teasers to safely peek inside boxes

    • Capture Nets to catch escaping cats

    • And more

Collect & Progress:

  • 100 unique cats to discover and add to your collection

  • Each cat has its own personality and appearance

  • New cats appear as you play more, encouraging exploration

5 Exciting Difficulty Modes:

  • Easy & Normal: Perfect for casual play (5-10 minutes)

  • Hard, Challenge & Extreme: Face more complex maps and special cats. Extended sessions (15-30 minutes) with tricky surprises.

  • Watch out for mischievous dogs in higher difficulties!

With its charming art style and casual gameplay loop, Unbox The Cats is the purr-fect choice for puzzle enthusiasts and cat lovers alike. Each session brings new cats to discover, making every game a delightful adventure of tactical decisions and cute rewards.

Whether you're looking for a quick coffee break distraction or a longer strategic challenge, there's a difficulty level that's right for you. Can you collect all the cats and become the ultimate feline friend?
